title: Khamenei’s son chosen as Iran’s supreme leader, extending hardline rule
summary_full: The selection of Mojtaba Khamenei sent a message of defiance against Donald Trump after U.S.-Israeli strikes killed his father Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
summary_public: The selection of Mojtaba Khamenei sent a message of defiance against Donald Trump after U.S.-Israeli strikes killed his father Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S.-Israeli strikes killed his father Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
